name: GOLFZON Social
about: GOLFZON Social is an indoor golf and entertainment venue located across three New York locations and one in Chicagoland. It combines world-class golf simulators with a full-service sports bar, offering a social atmosphere for both casual players and serious golfers. The venue features cutting-edge technology and a range of amenities, including leagues, tournaments, lessons, and flexible event spaces for parties of various sizes. Pricing is structured per hour per bay, allowing groups up to six people to share the same hourly rate.
why_golfers_like_it: Cutting-edge simulators offering a pure and fun golf experience
Social atmosphere combining golf with a full bar and elevated food options
Flexible event spaces and private rooms for tournaments and celebrations

food_and_drink.notes: Full bar service with local beers and cocktails

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Guests are encouraged to bring their own clubs. Rental sets for adults and kids, including limited lefty sets, are available on a first-come, first-served basis.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted. The venue offers a full bar service and a menu of elevated bar food and local beers.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: For the average golfer, it takes approximately 45 minutes to 1 hour to play a round of 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFZON Social is family-friendly and offers a safe environment for players of all ages. It also hosts junior golf camps and events specifically designed for younger players.
